title: anakupto #0352
definition:
1) to raise or lift one's self up
    1a) one's body
    1b) one's soul
        1b1) to be elated or exalted
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to raise or lift one's self up
    1a) one's body
    1b) one's soul
        1b1) to be elated or exalted

    NASB:  to roll away or back:
